title: deyeuxia atjehensis
intro: Deyeuxia atjehensis, also known as the Atjeh Deyeuxia, is a type of grass native to Indonesia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Deyeuxia atjehensis include the ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, or used in traditional medicine practices.
